name: Full Plumbing Design Pipeline
description: End-to-end plumbing design workflow: system config → fixture scan → network build → sizing → slope fix → vent creation → trap insertion → pressure analysis → pump selection → water safety → documentation.

steps.name: Save System Configuration
steps.description: Saves building type, plumbing code (BS-UK / IPC-US / AS-3500 / SANS-10252), materials, and velocity limits.

steps.name: Scan Fixture Units
steps.description: Walks all plumbing fixtures, assigns DU/LU/WSFU from tables, writes PLM_DRN_DU_NR, PLM_SUP_LU_CW_NR, PLM_SUP_LU_HW_NR.

steps.name: Build Pipe Network Graph
steps.description: Constructs directed connectivity graph (BFS from fixtures → mains → termination). Foundation for all system-level calculations.

steps.name: Size Cold + Hot Water Supply
steps.description: BS EN 806-3 / Hunter pipe sizing for DCW and DHW systems. Writes PLM_SUP_QD, PLM_SUP_VEL, PLM_SUP_DN_REQ.

steps.name: Size Drainage
steps.description: BS EN 12056-2 / IPC 2021 drainage sizing. Writes PLM_CALC_DN_MM and PLM_CALC_SLOPE_PCT.

steps.name: Apply Drainage Slopes
steps.description: Enforces minimum slopes per BS EN 12056-2 / AS 3500 / IPC on all drainage pipes. Moves pipe endpoints to achieve correct gradients.

steps.name: Design Vent System
steps.description: BS EN 12056-2 Annex B vent sizing + physical vent pipe creation. Places AAVs where branch length exceeds limit.

steps.name: Insert P-Traps
steps.description: Detects and inserts P-trap families on fixtures missing a trap seal. BS 6465-2 / DW 144-2 seal depths.

steps.name: Place Pipe Sleeves
steps.description: Inserts sleeve families at wall/slab penetrations. Fire-rating inherited from host element.

steps.name: Plan Hanger Locations
steps.description: Generates hanger spacing plan per BS 5572 / BSRIA BG 29. Trapeze grouping for shared runs.

steps.name: Pressure Check by Network
steps.description: Static pressure at each network node. Colours pipes by pressure zone (red/amber/green). Writes PLM_PRESSURE_KPA.

steps.name: Pump Selection
steps.description: Calculates duty head + flow from critical path. Matches to pump catalogue. Writes PLM_PUMP_DUTY_HEAD_M, PLM_PUMP_MODEL_TXT.

steps.name: Expansion Vessel Sizing
steps.description: BS 7074-1 expansion vessel sizing for closed DHW systems.

steps.name: Water Safety — Dead-Leg Scan
steps.description: HSG 274 dead-leg detection. Flags legs > 0.45m. Writes PLM_DEAD_LEG_LENGTH_M.

steps.name: Water Safety — TMV Register
steps.description: BS 8680 / HTM 04-01 TMV scan. Validates outlet temperatures, flags overdue tests.

steps.name: Legionella Risk Assessment Report
steps.description: Generates ACOP L8 / HSG 274 structured risk assessment combining dead-leg data, TMV register, and system description.

steps.name: Backflow Audit
steps.description: BS EN 1717 fluid category classification and cross-connection check.

steps.name: Generate Drainage Schematic
steps.description: Auto-generates drainage riser schematic diagram in a new Drafting View from the pipe network graph.

steps.name: Generate BOQ
steps.description: Exports plumbing Bill of Quantities to CSV: pipe lengths by DN/material, fittings, accessories, fixtures.

steps.name: Full Plumbing Audit
steps.description: RAG dashboard: drainage compliance, supply pressures, slope adequacy, dead-legs, TMVs, material compatibility. Final sign-off gate.
